crypto_vulnerabilities.debugMessage: Use of non-quantum-resistant public-key algorithms (must be ML-KEM, ML-DSA, SLH-DSA): RSA
Cryptographic keys should be robust. Use a key length of more than 1024 bits.

complianceLevels.label: FIPS140-3-L1 capable
complianceLevels.message: Use of asymmetric key pair generation algorithm RSA is FIPS compliant, provided approved key sizes [2048, 3072, 4096] are used.

complianceLevels.label: Not Quantum Safe
complianceLevels.message: The asset has an asymmetric primitive and does not match with the Quantum Safe whitelists of OIDs and algorithms.

crypto_vulnerabilities.debugMessage: Use of non-quantum-resistant public-key algorithms (must be ML-KEM, ML-DSA, SLH-DSA): ECDH

complianceLevels.label: FIPS140-3-L1 capable
complianceLevels.message: Use of key agreement algorithm ECDH is FIPS compliant, provided approved elliptic curves [B-233, B-283, B-409, B-571, K-233, K283, K-409, K-571, P-224, P-256, P-384, P-521] are used.

complianceLevels.message: The asset has an asymmetric primitive and does not match with the Quantum Safe whitelists of OIDs and algorithms.
